payload.answer: Extracted one low-confidence atomic fact: the mock fetch for the provided article URL failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL is malformed/punctuated in the input, so no durable entity resolution is possible without guessing.

memory_cards.statement: A mock fetch for the article at the provided URL resulted in a 404 network error.

details: Input contained an explicit mock fetch result of 404 network error.
No article content was available to extract beyond the failure event.

repair_options: Provide the correctly formatted article URL if you want the system to fetch and extract article content.
Resend the article text directly to avoid fetch failure.
